name: Corn Bread & Dried Fruit Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 8 cups Corn bread stuffing mix, OR your favorite fresh made
recipeInstructions:
If making your own cornbread, prepare according to your recipe. Cool in pan on rack to room temperature.
Cut into 1-inch cubes. Place on baking sheet and bake in preheated 350°F oven for 12 minutes to dry.
Combine prunes and apricots in a bowl. Add warmed Triple sec. Heat butter in a large skillet over low heat. Add onion and garlic; saute 12 minutes or until very soft.
Transfer to a very large bowl. Add corn bread cubes, chicken broth and fruits along with triple sec. Stuff turkey according to directions on turkey. Can also be made in a 9x13-inch greased baking dish. Bake, covered, in preheated 350°F oven for 35-40 minutes. Uncover last 10 minutes of baking for a crispy top.
